Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes the R1 Concepts website for current brake part products, promotions, and featured inventory to use as email content.

R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all ticket context and AI recommendations within HubSpot, streamlining the support workflow and maintaining a complete audit trail.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions that customers have submitted, collecting all relevant complaint and return data.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Performs keyword-based web searches to discover content creators, influencers, and relevant social profiles matching the target criteria.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the completed catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of submission, enabling same-day responses to special market customer inquiries.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantities, on-order status, and in-transit shipments.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the need for a dozen people to independently look up the same parts across multiple systems, consolidating hours of redundant work into one automated pull.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the weekly backorder report with the live inventory data, flags dead-end parts that have no viable source or replenishment path, and categorizes each line item by fulfillment status.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into an actionable, prioritized report so the team instantly knows which orders can be fulfilled and which need escalation or customer notification.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered items, tailored by status — updates for parts in transit, alternatives for dead-end parts, and revised timelines for items on order.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Provides ready-to-send customer emails that previously required individual manual drafting, dramatically accelerating customer communication and reducing response time from days to minutes.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to compile a complete make/model/year reference sheet for all available two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automates the tedious process of manually browsing three separate supplier websites, capturing every available rotor application in a fraction of the time.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped two-piece rotor data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlap, gaps, and new market opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals which competitor rotors DFC already covers and where new product opportunities exist, enabling data-driven inventory expansion decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data and purchase interest for two-piece rotor applications identified in the catalog analysis.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Validates real customer demand before committing to inventory decisions, reducing risk and ensuring new product additions are backed by market interest.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Consolidates all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino to review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, comprehensive decision-ready document that combines supplier availability, DFC coverage, and customer demand — giving Dino everything needed to act in one place.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting every piece of ad copy including headlines, descriptions, primary text, and call-to-action fields.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility into all live ad copy across platforms in one sweep, eliminating the need to manually click through dozens of ad sets and campaigns.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for specific flagged phrases, identifies exact matches, and logs the precise ad field and full copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance issues, outdated messaging, or prohibited claims across hundreds of ads in seconds — work that would take hours of manual review per platform.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted flagged-list report showing every match found, organized by platform, campaign, ad, and the exact field containing the flagged phrase.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit report directly to the team's inbox, enabling immediate remediation of problematic ad copy before it triggers platform penalties or brand risk.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking **53 total agents** — **24 completed**, **9 in progress**, and **20 planned**. This week we added four new agents to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, a daily lead-gen tool finding local businesses for our Midway Place sublet; **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI**, which will analyze and optimize Amazon ad campaigns across both brands; **R1 Video Clipper**; and **Paid Channel Chat Bot**. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** moved to Completed, giving us a polished new version of our weekly agent tracking output. Momentum continues to build — more updates next week!
